name: rhetoric
description: Analyze how language shapes perception — framing, persuasion mechanics, audience positioning, accountability language, narrative construction, and euphemism detection. Reveals how word choices create, obscure, or shift power, responsibility, and understanding. Usable standalone or as a meta-layer on any other plugin's output.

skills.name: rhet_framing
skills.description: Analyze how language frames a situation — what's highlighted, what's hidden, what metaphors operate, and whose interests the framing serves.

skills.name: rhet_persuasion
skills.description: Audit persuasive techniques (ethos, pathos, logos) and assess whether persuasion is legitimate communication or manipulative exploitation.

skills.name: rhet_audience
skills.description: Analyze how language positions its audience — what assumptions it makes, what role it assigns, and whether the communication serves the reader or the writer.

skills.name: rhet_accountability
skills.description: Audit how language assigns, defers, or obscures accountability. The critical fiduciary skill — catches 'the AI suggests' vs 'I recommend' and similar accountability shifts.

skills.name: rhet_narrative
skills.description: Deconstruct embedded narratives — heroes, villains, conflicts, morals. Identifies what story is being told, what it excludes, and whose interests it serves.

skills.name: rhet_euphemism
skills.description: Detect and translate euphemistic, vague, or obscuring language into direct, plain language. Reveals what's being hidden and why.

skills.name: rhet_loyalty
skills.description: Analyze whether recommendation language is optimized for the user's outcome or for the provider's liability protection. Asks what the language is optimizing for — the person receiving the advice or the person giving it.

commands.name: rhet_frame_flip
commands.description: Quick Frame Flip — 3 alternative frames that reveal what the current frame hides

commands.name: rhet_accountability_scan
commands.description: Quick Accountability Scan — who the language says is responsible vs who actually is

commands.name: rhet_spot_spin
commands.description: Quick Spot Spin — most significant bias or spin in the text

commands.name: rhet_plain_language
commands.description: Quick Plain Language — translate euphemisms and jargon into direct language

commands.name: rhet_rephrase_accountable
commands.description: Rephrase for Accountability — rewrite so responsibility is explicitly assigned

commands.name: rhet_loyalty_check
commands.description: Quick Loyalty Audit — GREEN/YELLOW/RED flags across four dimensions: language loyalty, beneficiary analysis, evidence quality, stakeholder completeness
